features: Implement Gateway Web Application Firewall (WAF) Shield to block malicious exploitation payloads (XSS, SQLi, Path Traversal, Cmd Injection).
Implement client-side interactive Terminal UI (TUI) Dashboard for real-time network and latency monitoring (-no-tui flag to disable).
Implement live WebSocket-driven telemetry updates for responsive, lower-overhead Admin Web Dashboard monitoring.
Add smart local service port auto-probing (8080/13000/3000) and installer redirect routes (/install and /install.ps1) for simplified developer onboarding.
Add client JSON status file generation and status-json CLI query command for LDM execution loop integration.
